content:
We were honored to support Camp New Day and HANDS of North Arlington's combined 100 Years of Service Gala as a Silver Sponsor.

Because of our sponsorship, five campers were able to attend this incredible celebration, giving them the opportunity to be part of a night that recognized a combined century of hope, resilience, and community.

The evening was a tremendous success, raising more than $20,000 to help Camp New Day and HANDS continue providing life-changing experiences for its families.

We're proud to stand alongside organizations making a meaningful difference and grateful to be part of an event that celebrates 100 years of impact.

Congratulations to everyone who made this milestone gala such a success. Here's the next 100 years of changing lives.
